History of all temporary page removal requests for this property, filed by any owner or full user in the past 6 months, using this report. Learn more

The type of request:


  Temporarily remove URL: Remove the page from Google Search Results for about 6 months after request approval date.
  Clear cached URL: Clear the cached version of the page and the snippet until the next time the page is indexed.

TypeThe type of request; can be one of the following:


  Outdated snippet removal: The page will still exist, but with updated content. This removal clears the snippet in the result until the next time the page is reindexed.
  Outdated page removal: The page no longer exists, and has been cleared from the Google index and search results.
